hero.title: We are Rimelight Entertainment
hero.description: We are creators of Grand Tale.

company.title: Pushing the boundaries of {interactive}
company.description: Founded in 2023, Rimelight Entertainment is independent and player-focused. We don't just create games; we create living, breathing worlds that respect your time and intelligence.

grandTale.description: A high-fantasy social life-sim game which hosts sub-games of multiple genres.

news.title: Latest News
news.description: Read our latest news, posts, and project updates.

cta.title: Ready to play?
cta.description: Join us and let's tell our story together.

hero.title: May the story never end!
hero.description: Grand Tale is the next generation open-world RPG from Rimelight Entertainment. Explore a living world shaped by player agency and emergent storytelling.

about.title: About Grand Tale
about.description: Grand Tale is a high-fantasy social life-sim game which hosts sub-games of multiple genres. The game is set in a world where players can explore, create, and explore their own worlds. The game is a living, breathing world that respects your time and intelligence.

hero.title: About Grand Tale

story.title: The story so far...
story.description: , where they find the Ohrn, a mysterious artifact with powers over life itself. the group set out to form the Grand Tale and live the greatest story ever told.
